knife_up_handle: Grasp the knife handle to cut.
Hold the knife by the handle for cutting.
knife_down_blade: Grasp the knife blade to pass it safely.
hammer_up_handle: Grasp the hammer handle to strike.
Hold the hammer by the handle for hitting a nail.
hammer_down_handle: Grasp the hammer handle to pull a nail.
Grip the handle so the claw can pry a nail loose.
hammer_up_head: Grasp the hammer head to pass it.
Hold the hammer head for a handoff.
hammer_down_head: Grasp the lower side of the hammer head to pass it.
Hold the lower side of the hammer head for a handoff.
Grasp the lower side of the hammer head to pass.
brush_up_handle: Grasp the brush handle to clean.
Hold the brush by the handle for cleaning.
brush_up_head: Grasp the brush head to pass it.
Hold the brush head for a handoff.
brush_down_head: Grasp the lower side of the brush head to pass it.
Hold the lower side of the brush head for a handoff.
Grasp the lower side of the brush head to pass.
mug_up_handle: Grasp the mug handle to pour.
Hold the mug by the handle for pouring.
mug_front_rim: Grasp the front rim of the mug to pass it.
Hold the front side of the mug rim for a handoff.
drill_up_handle: Grasp the drill handle to operate it.
Hold the upper drill handle for drilling.
drill_left_head: Grasp the left side of the drill head to pass it.
Hold the left side of the drill head for a handoff.
Grasp the left side of the drill head to pass.
drill_right_head: Grasp the right side of the drill head to pass it.
Hold the right side of the drill head for a handoff.
Grasp the right side of the drill head to pass.
drill_front_head: Grasp the front side of the drill head to pass it.
Hold the front side of the drill head for a handoff.
spoon_up_handle: Grasp the spoon handle to scoop.
Hold the spoon by the handle for scooping.
spoon_left_head: Grasp the left side of the spoon head to pass it.
Hold the left side of the spoon bowl for a handoff.
Grasp the left side of the spoon head to pass.
spoon_right_head: Grasp the right side of the spoon head to pass it.
Hold the right side of the spoon bowl for a handoff.
Grasp the right side of the spoon head to pass.
spoon_front_head: Grasp the front side of the spoon head to pass it.
Hold the front side of the spoon bowl for a handoff.
